title: Gooey Russian Baked Beans Casserole
description: Savory, gooey brunch casserole with baked beans, fluffy dumplings, and melty cheese—perfectly kosher-friendly and comforting.

ingredients.name: dumplings (store‑bought or homemade)
ingredients.notes: place on top of beans before final bake

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together milk, cornstarch, flour, salt, and pepper until smooth. Add beans, onion, garlic, and half of the cheese, then stir until beans are coated.
Transfer mixture to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish and spread evenly.
Arrange dumpling pieces on top of the bean mixture, spacing them slightly.
Drizzle olive oil over dumplings and sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
Cover dish loosely with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and bake another 15 minutes until the cheese is bubbly and dumplings are golden.
Let stand 5 minutes before serving to allow textures to set.
